# download-bins

help.chatUrl and help.download.* binary URLs

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/help/download-bins` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  help.chatUrl: https://chat.example.com
  help.chatText: Need help?
  help.download.darwin-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-darwin-amd64
  help.download.linux-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-linux-amd64
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    help:
      binaryURLs:
        darwin-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-darwin-amd64
        linux-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-linux-amd64
      chat:
        text: Need help?
        url: https://chat.example.com
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  help.chatText: Need help?
  help.chatUrl: https://chat.example.com
  help.download.darwin-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-darwin-amd64
  help.download.linux-amd64: https://example.com/argocd-linux-amd64
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
